name: Thug
special_abilities: [{"name":"Pack Tactics","desc":"The thug has advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the thug's allies is within 5 ft. of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated."}]
actions: [{"name":"Multiattack","desc":"The thug makes two melee attacks."},{"name":"Mace","desc":"Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) bludgeoning damage."},{"name":"Heavy Crossbow","desc":"Ranged Weapon Attack: +2 to hit, range 100/400 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d10) piercing damage."}]
